title: Denise Brunsdon boosts McCarthy Tétrault’s Litigation and Trademark Expertise in Calgary
content:
## Denise Brunsdon boosts McCarthy Tétrault’s Litigation and Trademark Expertise in Calgary
We are excited to welcome Denise Brunsdon as a Partner in our National Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group in Calgary. Denise is a generalist corporate and commercial litigator with deep experience across court, mediation, arbitration, and regulatory proceedings. Her practice spans complex disputes involving intellectual property, health law, commercial real estate, employment, energy, construction, and banking.
As a registered trademark agent and IP litigator, Denise advises clients on securing, protecting, and enforcing trademarks, patents, copyrights, and on issues in digital media, entertainment, data security, and privacy law across a range of industries. She has particular strength in mixed litigation matters that sit at the intersection of corporate risk and IP law.
Denise regularly appears before arbitration tribunals and the Alberta Court of King’s Bench, and has appeared before the Alberta Court of Appeal and the Federal Court of Canada. She is valued for her ability to translate complex legal and technical issues into clear, business‑focused strategies that help clients manage risk and resolve disputes efficiently.
Recognized by Best Lawyers in Canada as “One to Watch” in Corporate and Commercial Litigation, Denise has received awards for leadership in business and law, excellence in sex discrimination law, and community leadership. She is active in the legal community and is a frequent author and presenter on trademarks, copyright, and the responsible use of artificial intelligence.
“Denise’s arrival meaningfully strengthens our commercial litigation capabilities and IP services in Calgary,” said Tom Sutton , Practice Group Leader, Litigation and Dispute Resolution . “Her ability to navigate complex disputes across IP, technology, and core business issues — combined with her skilled appearances in court, arbitration, and regulatory proceedings — provides clients with the practical, specialized support they need in fast‑moving and highly regulated environments.”
“I’m excited to join McCarthy Tétrault’s Litigation and Dispute Resolution Group,” said Denise Brunsdon . “The Firm’s outstanding reputation and collaborative approach to client service is an ideal environment to develop creative, client-focused strategies and solutions that protect their interests today and for the long-term.”

### About McCarthy Tétrault
McCarthy Tétrault LLP provides a broad range of legal services, providing strategic and industry-focused advice and solutions for Canadian and international interests. The Firm has a substantial presence in Canada’s major commercial centres as well as in New York City and London.
Built on an integrated approach to the practice of law and delivery of innovative client services, the Firm brings its legal talent, industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve the results that are important to them.
For further information, or to request an interview with a McCarthy Tétrault lawyer, please contact media@mccarthy.ca .
- Denise Brunsdon Partner, Registered Trademark Agent People.Offices.Singular Calgary
